jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Voylla - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Marketplace Manager with drive and ambition, Voylla in Bhubaneswar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Voylla:
Voylla is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Voylla!
